name: Ningbo Gaofa Automotive Control System Co., Ltd.
summary: Ningbo Gaofa Automotive Control System Co., Ltd. designs, develops, manufactures, and operates automotive control products in China. The company offers variable speed control systems, electronic accelerator pedals, electronic shifters, and automotive cables. It supplies its products to automotive industry. The company was founded in 1999 and is based in Ningbo, China.
